shared_properties: Friction meter stays centered at the lower screen and preserves the 240 px width defined in the GDD.
Color coding stays consistent with high-friction stone, low-friction slick floor, and maximum-brake feedback.
differences: This atlas contains four named states for neutral, left-brake, right-brake, and both-brake feedback without adding text labels.

reference_images.label: Slip Down GDD mirror
reference_images.purpose: Gauge size, lower-center placement, and friction-readout role grounding.

reference_images.label: Slip Down moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Contrast tuning for the lower HUD against dark floor art grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use a TextureAtlas-backed ImageNode in the bottom HUD tree and switch frames directly from input state and contact state.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/friction_meter_bar.png through AssetServer and keep the atlas handle in the friction-meter UI state keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Atlas exposes neutral, left_brake, right_brake, and both_brake states.
Bottom anchor uses integer coordinates to preserve pixel sharpness.

context.role: Lower-center feedback bar that visualizes the current friction intensity without extra text.
context.usage: Visible during gameplay only and updated on every input-state change.

deliverables.notes: Four 240x8 frames for the neutral and brake-direction states.
State map for neutral, left_brake, right_brake, and both_brake frames.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas size is exactly 960x8 px with four 240x8 states.
Neutral, left_brake, right_brake, and both_brake states are visually distinct without using text labels.
Gauge remains readable against dark floors when anchored at y=708 px on the 1280x720 canvas.
